title: Council of Nicaea
summary: Addressed Arianism, defended the full divinity of the Son, and gave the church its first ecumenical creed.

title: Great Schism
summary: A long-brewing rupture shaped by theology, papal authority, culture, and political tensions between East and West.

title: Protestant Reformation
summary: A western church crisis around authority, reform, sacraments, and salvation that created enduring confessional divisions.
